text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the Hanshin Daishoten has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Let's go, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I'm ready! My engines are fully revved!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I will!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Brian!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...You're finally here.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I am.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Heehee. I'm a good girl who always keeps my
promises.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...You're a brat.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
What?! You're so mean! How could you say that
to me?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You behave like a brat, so you're a brat. Tch...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Later.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: W-wait!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You got more to say?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: As a matter of fact, I do!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Give it all you've got today!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
No holding back! I wanna beat you while you're
running as fast as you can.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: That's the best way for me to twinkle.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: As fast as I can, huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Cut the crap.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hey, that was totally uncalled for! I'm being
serious!
